Unlisted Tokens

New York City transportation-related tokens and oddities not presently included in the Atwood-Coffee Catalogue.

Unlisted Tokens

UNL-MAN-0001 Unlisted Gold Presentation Piece Related to NY630AS

Gold piece related to NY630AS, likely struck as a presentation issue.

Oddities & Errors

ODD-0001 Double Obverse NYC Transit Token

Token struck with obverse dies on both sides.

Exonumist is an independent collector resource focused on New York City token history.
